description:
You are a storage administrator who has just finished synchronizing an important
  backup file.  
  A colleague already placed the backup at  

      /home/user/backups/project_backup.tar.gz  

  Your next step is to verify the file’s integrity and record the result.

  1. Create (or overwrite, if it already exists) a log file called  
         /home/user/backups/checksum.log  

  2. Use *exactly one* terminal command that:
     • Calculates the SHA-256 checksum of  
         /home/user/backups/project_backup.tar.gz  
     • Redirects the full, untouched output of the checksum command to  
         /home/user/backups/checksum.log  

  3. Required format of /home/user/backups/checksum.log  
     • The file must contain **one and only one line**.  
     • The line must be *precisely* what the `sha256sum` utility prints:  
           64 lowercase hexadecimal characters, two spaces, then the file name  
           “project_backup.tar.gz”, followed by a single newline.  
       Example pattern (do **NOT** copy these digits—use the real checksum that
       the command outputs):  
           012345…(total 64 hex digits)…cdef  project_backup.tar.gz\n  

  Do not add any additional text or blank lines.  
  When you are done, the automated test will read /home/user/backups/checksum.log
  and verify that its single line matches the required format and contains the
  correct SHA-256 digest for the file provided.
truth:
Initial state
  -------------
  • The directory /home/user/backups already exists.
  • File /home/user/backups/project_backup.tar.gz exists and contains exactly the
    five ASCII bytes:
        68 65 6c 6c 6f
    which is the string “hello”.

  Ground-truth checksum
  ---------------------
  The SHA-256 digest for the file’s contents is:
      2cf24dba5fb0a30e26e83b2ac5b9e29e1b161e5c1fa7425e73043362938b9824

  Expected final file
  -------------------
  /home/user/backups/checksum.log  
  Content (including the final newline character):
      2cf24dba5fb0a30e26e83b2ac5b9e29e1b161e5c1fa7425e73043362938b9824  project_backup.tar.gz\n
name: task_000000_216503c6
